(colophon)
r 2'2'

IM mba-as-si-⸢ia?⸣ [...]1

(r 2') Tablet of Bassiya, [...] of Anu and Antu, Urukean. Hand of [...].

r 3'3'

d60 u an-tu₄ UNUGki u₂ qat₃ md[...]

r 4'4'

ina me-reš-ti-šu₂ la u₂-šam-qiš-šu₂ ina MUL₂-⸢šu₂⸣ [...]

(r 4') [...] he shall not deliberately let it be dropped. [...] in the evening. [...] of Adad and Šala shall not take it (the tablet) away.

r 5'5'

[d]⸢IŠKUR⸣ u dŠA.LA <la> litTUM₂-⸢šu₂ UNUG⸣ki iti⸢DU₆⸣ U₄ 11-[KAM ...]

(r 5') Uruk, Tašritu 11 [...].

1The name may also be read {m}BA{+as-si-ia} for Iqiša
